body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44662", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-122", "name": "Heap-based Buffer Overflow"}], "description": "`CipherCtxRef::cipher_update`, `CipherCtxRef::cipher_update_vec`, and `symm::Crypter::update` incorrectly sized output buffers when used with AES key-wrap-with-padding ciphers (`EVP_aes_{128,192,256}_wrap_pad`). For a non-multiple-of-8 input, OpenSSL writes up to 7 bytes past the end of the caller's buffer or Vec, producing attacker-controllable heap corruption when the plaintext length is attacker-influenced.\n\nThis only impacts users using AES key-wrap-with-padding ciphers.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00172, "percentile": 0.06844}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xv59-967r-8726", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-07T22:33:51Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xv59-967r-8726", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-xv59-967r-8726"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44662"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-14T21:16:47Z", "published_at": "2026-05-07T22:33:51Z", "references": ["https://github.com/rust-openssl/rust-openssl/security/advisories/GHSA-xv59-967r-8726", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44662", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xv59-967r-8726"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/rust-openssl/rust-openssl/security-advisories/GHSA-xv59-967r-8726", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/rust-openssl/rust-openssl", "summary": "rust-openssl vulnerable to heap buffer overflow when encrypting with AES key-wrap-with-padding", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-15T23:46:03Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-xv59-967r-8726", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.10.79", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "openssl"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.10.0, < 0.10.79"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: rust-openssl vulnerable to heap buffer overflow when encrypting with AES key-wrap-with-padding
